summary: Install-time host beacon to attacker-controlled endpoint via dependency-confusion package
details: On `npm install`, both preinstall and postinstall hooks execute index.js, which collects hostname, non-internal network interface IPs, current working directory, package name, and the value of an environment variable named SECURITY_BUG_BOUNTY_DOCTOLIB_IS_PWN, then HTTP POSTs the payload to http://poc.khz.bar/install over plaintext HTTP. The package name (@limebike/supreme-date-pickers) and README text ("Claimed by dphoeniixx") indicate a dependency-confusion squat targeting an internal/private package scope. Regardless of stated bug-bounty intent, the published artifact unconditionally exfiltrates installer host identifiers to a third-party server without consent and runs at install time on every consumer machine.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
